title: The Bike Race on the Lane
synopsis: Two friends race their bicycles down a quiet lane and learn that fun matters more than winning.
sentences: Nico and Tom met on the lane behind their houses with their bicycles.
They had both been waiting for a dry day to race.
Nico's bike was blue and shiny, while Tom's bike was older but very fast.
They chose a lamp post at the end of the lane as the finish line.
On the count of three, both boys pushed hard on the pedals.
The wheels hummed over the road as they rode side by side.
Halfway down the lane, Nico almost lost speed when his foot slipped.
Tom looked over and shouted for him to keep going.
In the end, Tom reached the lamp post first by only a little.
Nico bent over his handlebars and laughed instead of feeling upset.
The race had been so close that both of them wanted another turn immediately.
Sometimes the best part of a race is simply racing well together.
